caption.full:
Wonder Project acquires three UK and Ireland series

Wonder Project is expanding its international scripted programming with three new series from the U.K. and Ireland. The slate includes acquisitions of two existing shows and a new commission. One acquisition is Leonard and Hungry Paul, narrated by Julia Roberts.

Are you excited for Wonder Project’s UK acquisitions or is this another hollow acquisition?

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#TVNews #WonderProject #LeonardAndHungryPaul #JuliaRoberts
caption.firstComment: Julia Roberts narrating Leonard and Hungry Paul is peak prestige fluff — this slate feels more like vanity packaging than a bold strategy.

youtube.title: Wonder Project Acquires Julia Roberts-Narrated Series
youtube.description:
Wonder Project is expanding its international scripted programming with three new series from the U.K. and Ireland. The slate includes Leonard and Hungry Paul, narrated by Julia Roberts, and the Russell T Davies-produced You & Me. Rewarding is a new comedy series premiering in late 2026.

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.
